item.title: Under Mission 300, A New Way of Doing Business Connects Over 50 Million People to Electricity Across Africa
item.description: See how Mission 300 is accelerating electricity access across Africa, connecting 50 million people and mobilizing billions for energy expansion.

item.title: Contact the World Bank Group
item.description: Contact the World Bank Group: reach headquarters, media relations, publications, and the speaker's bureau. Find help and connect with the right team.

item.title: Update on the World Bank Group Climate Change Action Plan
item.description: The WBG’s work on climate is and will remain firmly client driven, supporting them in delivering on their own ambitions as set out in their national plans and Nationally Determined Contributions (NDCs).

item.title: Middle East Conflict Sends Global Growth to Lowest Rate Since COVID-19
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East is expected to slow global growth to the lowest rate since the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic amid higher energy prices, steeper inflation, and increased borrowing costs, according to the World Bank Group’s latest Global Economic Prospects report.

item.title: The World Bank Group and Japan Expand Cooperation to Strengthen Critical Minerals Supply Chains and Energy Resilience
item.description: World Bank Group President Ajay Banga and Minister of Finance of Japan Satsuki Katayama today agreed to strengthen collaboration on helping developing countries build more resilient supply chains and energy systems, unlocking investment, jobs, and long-term economic growth.

item.title: Joint Statement by the Heads of the International Energy Agency, International Monetary Fund, World Bank Group and World Trade Organization
item.description: Washington, May 29, 2026: The Heads of the International Energy Agency, International Monetary Fund, World Bank Group and World Trade Organization met on May 28 as part of the high-level coordination group established in April to maximize their institutions’ response to the energy, trade, and economic impacts of the war in the Middle East.

item.title: Joint MDB Statement on Critical Minerals to Manufacturing Value Chains
item.description: MDBs align on a joint framework to build resilient, responsible critical minerals value chains and scale investment for energy and economic transformation.

item.title: World Bank Group to Double Guarantees for Africa to Catalyze Investment, Create Jobs
item.description: New commitment will bring annual guarantee issuance on the continent to $6.4 billion, aiming to improve the lives of some 190 million people by 2030

item.title: Videos | World Bank Group
item.description: Explore the World Bank Group's video library — from expert interviews and project highlights to data stories and documentary features on development around the world.
